name: Overseas Local Partnership Assessor
description: Evaluate overseas distributors, agencies, resellers, and ecosystem partners in minutes. Get weighted scorecards, due-diligence checklists, commercial model comparisons, and pilot plans with exit guardrails — not generic advice, but ready-to-use assessment frameworks.
author: Pearl-led OpenClaw team
safety: Partnership assessment is not legal, financial, or anti-corruption due diligence; obtain professional review before signing agreements.
